articles.title: MotoGP: Di Giannantonio wins dramatic Catalan GP after major crashes
articles.description: Fabio Di Giannantonio won a chaotic, red-flagged Catalan GP, his first victory since 2023. The race was marred by high-profile crashes from Jorge Martin, Pedro Acosta, Alex Marquez, and Johann Zarco, leading to multiple restarts.

articles.title: "Much Better Than I'd Ever Be": Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Gets Ultimate Praise From Sri Lanka Legend Kumar Sangakkara

articles.description: Legendary Nepali climber Kami Rita Sherpa has set a new world record, scaling Mount Everest for the 32nd time on May 17. On the same day, Lhakpa Sherpa, the "Mountain Queen," also broke her own record for the most ascents by a female, reaching the summit for the 11th time.

articles.title: Match-fixing scandal | 'Asked Tendulkar, Dravid and Kumble about approaches,' recalls Ganguly
articles.description: Sourav Ganguly: The former India captain said he asked Sachin Tendulkar, Rahul Dravid and Anil Kumble whether they had ever been approached during the match-fixing scandal that shook Indian cricket in the 2000s, recalling dressing room talks.

articles.title: Microsoft is retiring Teams‚Äô Together Mode in favour of ...
articles.description: Microsoft is retiring its Together Mode feature in Teams on June 30, opting for a streamlined meeting experience centered on the Gallery view. This consolidation aims to simplify interfaces, reduce complexity, and enhance video quality and performance for all users. The move promises fewer clicks and smoother video, especially on less powerful devices, allowing for faster innovation in core features.

articles.title: IPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals capable of beating any team, says Vikram Rathour
articles.description: IPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals batting coach Vikram Rathour is confident his team can reach the IPL playoffs. He stated the team must win their remaining two league matches. Rathour believes the squad has the capability to defeat any opponent when playing to their full potential. He also provided updates on player injuries and discussed batting strategies.
